ogTitle: Gobur vs Golden Gully: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gobur and Golden Gully.
heading: Gobur vs Golden Gully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gobur, Victoria and Golden Gully, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gobur has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Golden Gully (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gobur or Golden Gully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gobur has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Golden Gully scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gobur scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Golden Gully scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gobur or Golden Gully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gobur has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
